name: Pfeffernusse Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Citron or other candied fruit or fruit peel, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zest of 1 lemon.
2. Beat eggs well. Add sugar, about two tablespoons at a time, and beat thoroughly with each addition.
3. Add lemon zest and juice, finely chopped citron, mixed dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, cloves, nutmeg, mace, cinnamon), and chopped nuts to the egg mixture.
4. Chill the dough for at least one hour.
5. Roll out the dough to 1/2 inch thickness and cut into shapes using a Pfeffernusse cutter or an equivalent tool (narrow bottle top or round tin box).
6. Place cookies on a baking sheet and let stand overnight in a cool place to dry.
7. The next morning, invert each cookie and add a drop of fruit juice or brandy to the moist spot on the bottom. Bake upside down for 8 minutes at 300 degrees F.
8. Makes approximately 180-200 cookies. Let ripen and soften before using.
